description: Perform a regulatory compliance audit for five chemicals: Chlorine, Acetone, Propane, Benzene, and Formaldehyde (Solution). Use CAMEO Chemicals (https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/) to determine if each chemical is listed under the Clean Air Act 112(r) (Risk Management Program), Clean Water Act 311 (Hazardous Substances), and EPCRA Section 313 (Toxics Release Inventory). Record the findings in a CSV file at ~/Desktop/compliance_matrix.csv with headers 'Chemical,CAA_112r,CWA_311,EPCRA_313', using 'YES' or 'NO' for each chemical/regulation combination.
